Individual bet amounts are never visible on-chain.      Pool totals are revealed via threshold decryption for odds computation. \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502  SECURITY BOUNDARY \u2014 THE INVARIANT THAT MUST NEVER BE VIOLATED    \u2502 \u2502                                                                     \u2502 \u2502  Plaintext bet amounts or directions must NEVER exist on any       \u2502 \u2502  server, database, log, or code path outside of:                   \u2502 \u2502    1. The user's own browser during bet placement (their key)     \u2502 \u2502    2. The on-chain auditor-settlement flow after resolution        \u2502 \u2502                                                                     \u2502 \u2502  If a plaintext bet amount ever touches a server you control,      \u2502 \u2502  that is a CRITICAL BUG, not an edge case.                         \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. This makes VEIL auditable: a regulator can verify which bets were      decrypted and by whom, without seeing amounts they're not entitled to.","params":{"betIndex":"Index of the bet in the bets array"}},"finalize()":{"details":"Can be called by anyone after a 24-hour dispute window"},"getPublishedOdds()":{"returns":{"noTotal":"Decrypted NO pool total (from last threshold decryption)","totalBets":"Total number of bets placed","yesTotal":"Decrypted YES pool total (from last threshold decryption)"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"placeBet(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2],uint256[5],uint8,((uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256)))":{"details":"The bet amount is encrypted client-side using the user's eERC key. At no point does the contract see the plaintext amount.","params":{"encryptedBet":"The ElGamal ciphertext of the bet amount","proofA":"Groth16 proof point A","proofB":"Groth16 proof point B","proofC":"Groth16 proof point C","publicSignals":"[bettor, marketId, amountCommitment, poolCommitment, nullifier]","side":"1 = YES, 2 = NO"}},"postOutcome(uint8)":{"details":"Only callable by committee members after resolution time","params":{"_outcome":"The resolved outcome (1 = YES, 2 = NO)"}},"publishDecryptedTotals(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"This is the pragmatic v1 path: one committee member posts the totals      that the full committee agreed to off-chain. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"submitDecryptionShare(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Each committee member decrypts the pool totals with their key share.      When enough shares are collected, the plaintext totals are reconstructed.      This is the ONLY way pool totals become visible \u2014 through genuine      threshold decryption, not server-side computation.      v1: Committee members compute the decrypted aggregate off-chain from      their individual key shares and submit the agreed-upon total here.      The contract requires a 2/3 supermajority before publishing.      This is equivalent in trust to a multisig \u2014 honest for v1.","params":{"round":"Decryption round number","shareX":"X component \u2014 for v1, this carries the committee's agreed YES total","shareY":"Y component \u2014 for v1, this carries the committee's agreed NO total"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). b5e63ce05464d17d674a290bb8a7c","dweb:/ipfs/QmQKVzSQY1PM3Bid4QhgVVZyx6B4Jx7XgaQzLKHj38vJz8"]},"src/VeilMarket.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb7bd2289c9daefdbd9b85a3efe5be88326247a7b8440c3fb173cb371c900cb71","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://843967ffe036eadcd05ec424fe7d09fd384095ba4dad1e0bcfe5d80d04ff2116","dweb:/ipfs/QmWiNUpJhUMXE3LxtbRckHPVQQ7rqtcPrvDvi8GqepgWGU"]},"src/interfaces/IVeilBetVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9fc84d25a02578eb5573d32d8bc0188982b7b50a5039ff1b6396ecc1bab087a8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://77ef72de7269c7ebf38499fc4b4abe38c6da9c367717bb316cb37988865485b8","dweb:/ipfs/QmcSTuz9ZSdFAwZnzRt3PaQzADpewK1GsqqtmfrXnNbwca"]},"src/interfaces/IVeilRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd7f66b85be9ad19d600bd900d787fa375c94b95921006ecfa4080cf0e525e1d8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6b83e90d354d908edfec83560c08e54e12a3c05b4b3f73b7b8f71556b5af15f2","dweb:/ipfs/QmSLe3Eer5DEZ3JDTnyWorrh3Ngjhc99ZuRrWifF98kNHe"]}},"version":1}

disputeOutcome().details: Only callable during the dispute window

emitAuditorDecryption(uint256).details: Called by the auditor role (threshold key holders) after market      resolution to prove which decryptions occurred, without exposing      the plaintext amount on-chain. The actual decrypted value flows      through the off-chain auditor protocol only.      This makes VEIL auditable: a regulator can verify which bets were      decrypted and by whom, without seeing amounts they're not entitled to.

params.betIndex: Index of the bet in the bets array

finalize().details: Can be called by anyone after a 24-hour dispute window

returns.noTotal: Decrypted NO pool total (from last threshold decryption)
returns.yesTotal: Decrypted YES pool total (from last threshold decryption)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

placeBet(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint25.details: The bet amount is encrypted client-side using the user's eERC key.      The contract verifies a Groth16 proof that:        - The encrypted value is a valid ElGamal ciphertext        - The amount is within [minBet, maxBet] range        - The user has sufficient balance      The ciphertext is homomorphically added to the pool accumulator.      At no point does the contract see the plaintext amount.

params.encryptedBet: The ElGamal ciphertext of the bet amount

postOutcome(uint8).details: Only callable by committee members after resolution time

publishDecryptedTotals(uint256,uint256).details: This is the pragmatic v1 path: one committee member posts the totals      that the full committee agreed to off-chain. In production, replace      with the full threshold reconstruction path.      The key property is preserved: the committee can only decrypt AGGREGATE      totals. Individual bet amounts remain encrypted in the pool accumulators.

params.noTotal: Decrypted NO pool total (in eERC token units)
params.yesTotal: Decrypted YES pool total (in eERC token units)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

submitDecryptionShare(uint256,uint256,ui.details: Each committee member decrypts the pool totals with their key share.      When enough shares are collected, the plaintext totals are reconstructed.      This is the ONLY way pool totals become visible — through genuine      threshold decryption, not server-side computation.      v1: Committee members compute the decrypted aggregate off-chain from      their individual key shares and submit the agreed-upon total here.      The contract requires a 2/3 supermajority before publishing.      This is equivalent in trust to a multisig — honest for v1.

params.shareX: X component — for v1, this carries the committee's agreed YES total
params.shareY: Y component — for v1, this carries the committee's agreed NO total

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

betCount().notice: Get the number of bets placed

emitAuditorDecryption(uint256).notice: Emit an auditor decryption event for a specific bet

finalize().notice: Finalize the market after dispute window

getBet(uint256).notice: Get a bet by index (encrypted amount only)

getPublishedOdds().notice: Get the current published pool totals

isAcceptingBets().notice: Check if the market is still accepting bets

placeBet(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint25.notice: Place an encrypted bet on YES or NO

publishDecryptedTotals(uint256,uint256).notice: Committee shortcut: post decrypted totals directly (requires 1 member)

submitDecryptionShare(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Submit a partial decryption share for pool totals
